sections.paragraph:
Original: מדי

Transliteration: mâday

Phonetic: maw-dah'-ee

BDB Definition:

Mede = "middle land"
  1. an inhabitant of Media
    1. located northwest of Persia proper, south and southwest of the Caspian Sea, east of Armenia and Assyria, and west and northwest of the great salt desert of Iram

Origin: patrial from H4074

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Adjective
